generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our NATO allies have been consistently underfunding their defense budgets for years? While we're over here carrying the burden, countries like Germany and Italy are only spending 1.5% of their GDP on defense, far below the 2% target. This isn't just about money—it's about our safety. When allies don't pull their weight, it weakens our collective deterrence. We need to make sure our commitments are backed by real action, not just empty promises. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
